feed.description: Software engineering conversations: reliability, architecture, delivery, and the tradeoffs nobody puts in the blog post.
feed.title: Practical Systems

bullets: Welcome back to Practical Systems. Today we're talking about engineering communication, and I'm joined by Joll Wisenthal, staff engineer focused on platform teams. Joll Wisenthal, thanks for being…
Before we get into it — Priya Nayar was on episode 1 making the case that good on-call rotations are designed so waking up is rare.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
